name: node-which
title: node-which
description:
Cross-platform 'which' module for Node.js
node-which finds the first instance of a specified executable
in the PATH environment variable, simulating the behaviour of
the standard "which" program.
node-which supports all platforms supported by Node.js.
.
This is the module only, the binary being totally useless.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-which because Cross-platform 'which' module for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-which as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-which with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-which --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
